name: embedded-iot-engineering
description: Embedded firmware & IoT/edge engineering team — 3 agents (firmware-architect, embedded-engineer, iot-connectivity-engineer) for the constrained-device layer below the cloud: firmware architecture (RTOS vs bare-metal, MCU selection, memory & power budgets, HAL/driver layering, boot & OTA strategy, flash partitioning), low-level implementation (C/C++/Rust on MCU, interrupts/ISRs, DMA, I2C/SPI/UART peripheral drivers, real-time constraints, JTAG/SWD debugging, watchdogs), and IoT connectivity (MQTT/CoAP/BLE/LoRa/Zigbee/Wi-Fi, device provisioning & identity, fleet management, secure boot & key storage, telemetry). Decision-tree knowledge bank, 8 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios. Seams: cloud telemetry ingest -> data-streaming-engineering & the cloud plugins; mobile companion app -> mobile-engineering; device security review -> security-engineering. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
